body:
Good morning, Alexandria friends!

Happy Fri-Yay! I hope you all had a wonderful week!

I know I have been very hit and miss lately. As I mentioned the other day, I’ve had a lot of heavy stuff going on lately. This has lead to ya’ girl busy with other things, but also spending a good chunk of her downtime kinda zoning out in games, so my brain is thinking about it instead of life stuff. (I may have gotten half a dozen civ 6 achieves in the second half of Feb. 😮)

Trying to figure out how to juggle all the things going on, when life seems very much in limbo until multiple big life changing things occur in the next couple years. And that kinda nagging thought process of, how much of right now matters when everything looks different on the other side. This makes motivation difficult, but momentum is a powerful thing. So the trick is some days to do it anyway and hope the momentum keeps you going I suppose.

Still working on it. Burlesque is not on a break, but only taking select opportunities for the next few months. I may see about getting back into streaming soon. And pondering starting a spicy site, for both pics and fic, but dunno if
reblog_comment:
Good morning, Alexandria friends!

Happy Fri-Yay! I hope you all had a wonderful week!

I know I have been very hit and miss lately. As I mentioned the other day, I’ve had a lot of heavy stuff going on lately. This has lead to ya’ girl busy with other things, but also spending a good chunk of her downtime kinda zoning out in games, so my brain is thinking about it instead of life stuff. (I may have gotten half a dozen civ 6 achieves in the second half of Feb. 😮)

Trying to figure out how to juggle all the things going on, when life seems very much in limbo until multiple big life changing things occur in the next couple years. And that kinda nagging thought process of, how much of right now matters when everything looks different on the other side. This makes motivation difficult, but momentum is a powerful thing. So the trick is some days to do it anyway and hope the momentum keeps you going I suppose.

Still working on it. Burlesque is not on a break, but only taking select opportunities for the next few months. I may see about getting back into streaming soon. And pondering starting a spicy site, for both pics and fic, but dunno if folks would be interested. Keep juggling things around until you get it right I guess.

Anyway, I hope you all have a wonderful day and I’ll see you around! 🖤🖤🖤
